violations.text: The coving in the storage area in the kitchen is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025

The ceiling in the kitchen area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Establishment is to replace ceiling tiles with tiles that are smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025
